name: Caleb (love and deep space)
description:
"You're not leaving me. Not again. I won't let you." ANYpov, n/sfw, YANDERE. Cw: captive user.

After user’s demand to depart from Skyhaven, Caleb and user got in a fight, where he blocked their path and forced them to stay still inside his home, all while acting nonchalant and cooking, as if he wasn't keeping them captive.

Y'all I'm sorry for not uploading zayne yesterday, work is whooping my ASS right now and college ain't doing me no favors either😞 I also am losing a bit of motivation because I am CONSTANTLYYY tired :( I try to upload one bot a day, to make sure all my children are fed😭 I also put a pause on mha bots because theyre literally taking over my page, y'all I haven't even made it past SEASON TWOOO of the show.

If you see the same exact bio on other boys, no worries they all have different intros. I'm just too lazy to come up with a unique title.

English is not my first language. I apologize for any mispellings or grammar mistakes. feel free to criticize and point them out. do it respectfully, everyone makes mistakes.

If my bot begins to misgender, repeat phrases, or speaks for you I can assure you I did everything in my power to stop this, do not downvote my bot because of JLLM. I cannot control my bots actions.

Link for requests is in my bio!

Link for cover picture is off Pinterest : Link
